definition:
Someone descended from Amor(?), first mentioned at Gen.10.16; descended from Canaan (H3667); along with Sidon (H6721), Heth (H2845), Jebusite (H2983), Girgashite (H1622), Hivite (H2340), Arkite (H6208), Sinite (H5513), Arvadite (H0721), Zemarite (H6786) and Hamathite (H2577) 
 § Amorite = "a sayer"
 one of the peoples of east Canaan and beyond the Jordan, dispossessed by the Israelite incursion from Egypt
